props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Provides an accessible label when no visible label is associated.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: References an external element that labels this component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the component.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state.

props.name: filterable
props.description: Enables filtering of options by typing in the trigger.

props.name: labelFormat
props.description: The display label format of the closed dropdown. When 'count' the display label shows only "n items" in the label, when 'list' it shows a comma separated list of selected item labels.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon shown to the left of the dropdown input.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Sets the maximum height of the dropdown content area.

props.name: name
props.description: Identifier for the group. Used in change events.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text shown when nothing is selected.

props.name: showSelectAll
props.description: Shows a "Select All" checkbox at the top of the options list.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size variant.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: Array of currently selected checkbox value.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets a fixed width for the component and popover panel.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the selected value change.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Provides an accessible label when no visible label is associated.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: References an external element that labels this component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the component. @default false

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state. @default false

props.name: filterable
props.description: Enables filtering of options by typing in the trigger.

props.name: label-format
props.description: The display label format of the closed dropdown. When 'count' the display label shows only "n items" in the label, when 'list' it shows a comma separated list of selected item labels. @default "list"

props.name: leading-icon
props.description: Icon shown to the left of the dropdown input.

props.name: max-height
props.description: Sets the maximum height of the dropdown content area. @default "276px"

props.name: mb
props.description: Bottom margin.

props.name: ml
props.description: Left margin.

props.name: mr
props.description: Right margin.

props.name: mt
props.description: Top margin.

props.name: name
props.description: Identifier for the group. Used in change events.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text shown when nothing is selected.

props.name: show-select-all
props.description: Shows a "Select All" checkbox at the top of the options list. @default false

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size variant.

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: Array of currently selected checkbox values.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets a fixed width for the component and popover panel.

events.name: _change
events.type: CustomEvent<{ name: string; value: string[]; labels: string[] }>
